## Assignment Summary
- Describe the issue or task this pull request completes.

## Related Issue
- Link the assignment issue, for example: `Closes #<issue-number>`.
- Link exactly one assignment issue in this section.

## Target Assignment Branch
- Name the required submission branch from the linked issue, for example: `assignment/uas-auth-service`.
- Your PR base branch must match the branch named in the linked issue.

## Design Note
- Briefly explain your planned approach before implementation and note any major changes you made while building it.

## Security Impact
- Explain the security problem fixed or the security improvement added.

## Changes Made
- List the main code or configuration updates.

## Validation
- Describe how you verified the change.

## AI Assistance Used
- State whether you used AI tools. If yes, name the tool(s) and describe the limited support they provided.

## What AI Helped With
- Summarize the specific tasks AI assisted with, such as concept explanation, debugging hints, or documentation lookup.

## What I Changed From AI Output
- If AI suggested code or structure, explain what you changed, rejected, or rewrote yourself.

## Security Decisions I Made Myself
- Explain the security choices you personally made and why.

## Authorship Affirmation
- Confirm that you understand the submitted code and can explain the design, security controls, and validation steps without assistance.

## Checklist
- [ ] I linked the related issue
- [ ] I linked exactly one assignment issue in the Related Issue section
- [ ] I started from the active assignment branch for this task
- [ ] My pull request targets the exact assignment branch named in the linked issue
- [ ] I included a short design note and meaningful validation details
- [ ] I disclosed any AI assistance used for this submission
- [ ] I can explain the key code paths, security decisions, and tests in this PR
- [ ] I tested the change locally
- [ ] I updated any directly related documentation or configuration, or none was required
